targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="chainsaw-runner", kind="summary"} | json | result=~`pass` [3m])) OR on() vector(0)
{job="chainsaw-runner", kind="test_case"} | json | line_format "status={{.status}}  name={{.test_name}}  duration={{.duration_ms}}ms  steps={{.steps}}  dir={{.base_path}}"

options.content:
# Test Suite Reference

| Dir | Test Name | What It Verifies |
|-----|-----------|-----------------|
| 01 | hub-cluster-ready | Hub cluster operational — Nodes exist |
| 02 | us-cluster-ready | Us spoke cluster operational — Nodes exist |
| 03 | widget-operator-healthy | CRD `widgets.platform.example.com` installed, operator Deployment Ready on us |
| 04 | fleet-registered | Fleet `ClusterProfile` for us exists on hub |
| 05 | kro-globalwidget | Kro RGD Active, creates RegionalWidgetRequest resources on hub |
| 06 | binding-controller | Cross-cluster fan-out: Widget on us, status back to GlobalWidget on hub |
| 07 | observability-stack | LGTM stack healthy — Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Tempo Ready |
| 08 | chainsaw-cronjob | Chainsaw runner CronJob exists in monitoring namespace |
| 09 | ingress-log-shipping | Ingress controller, Grafana ingress, event-exporter, Loki ready |
| 10 | oidc-trust | Multi-cluster OIDC trust — Dex tokens, JWKS, oidc-verifier |
| 11 | rotating-trust | v2 trust model — projected SA tokens, Kubelet rotation |
| 12 | dashboard-metrics | Grafana dashboards + Prometheus metrics from binding-controller |
| 13 | tenant-isolation | Widgets in correct tenant namespace, metrics carry tenant_id labels |
| 15 | dashboard-data | Grafana dashboards render actual Prometheus data |
| 16 | auth-configuration | Spoke kube-apiserver uses AuthenticationConfiguration (dual-issuer) |
| 17 | projected-sa-tokens | Hub-issued projected SA tokens — audience, file, issuer config |
| 18 | admission-guardrails | Platform Wins — 3 ValidatingAdmissionPolicy, non-admin blocked |
| 19 | multi-tenant-isolation | Strict namespace isolation — no cross-visibility |
| 20 | tenant-rbac-roles | Developer (CRU), analyst (read-only) roles, admin full access |
| 21 | platform-admin-access | Platform-admin manages ClusterRoles, users blocked |

---
**Total: 20 test cases**  |  Updated every 2 min via CronJob
